name: Species API
description:
This API works against data kept in the GBIF Checklist Bank which taxonomically indexes all registered [checklist datasets](https://www.gbif.org/dataset/search?type=CHECKLIST) in the GBIF network.

Internally we use a [Java web service client](https://github.com/gbif/checklistbank/tree/master/checklistbank-ws-client) for the consumption of these HTTP-based, RESTful JSON web services.
